name: The Wheel (Echoing Fate)
description: Units you already own are 20% more likely to appear. When you buy a duplicate of a unit you already own, gain 1 gold.
notes: "owned_units" is the one special dynamic resource keyword ShopEngine recognizes -- it isn't matched as a static tag, it's computed fresh against the player's current party/bench every time the shop is weighted. "available_modes": ["random"] is new -- this card is now Random-mode-only, since Draft players already chose their team deliberately. Remove the field entirely (or set it to []) to make a card available in every mode again.
